violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was ( 0) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (chlorine ) sanitizer is (50-100) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
(Sanitizer dispenser ) located in the (warewashing) area was not in good repair. PIC informed of proper manual sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (hood vents and prep table shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the serving line shelves and stove shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The ceiling above walk in freezer(missing tiles) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2023
Inspector observed a container of garlic in the basement storage area with mold. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Raw animal foods (steak and sausage) red above ready-to-eat foods (mangoes and chives) in the cold hold drawer. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

various food product and single service items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and basement storage and basement walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1.Hot hold oven 2.Serving line shelves 3.Food racks 4.Spice line shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The: 1.Walls throughout kitchen the area 2.Walls and ceiling in the dishwasher area 3.Hoods above stove has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023
The ceiling tiles in the above the walk-in cooler in basement area is in poor repair (missing tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
